name: j-stack-dev
description: Top-level JStack single Lead Engineer command for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Single Lead Engineer workflow, no subagents by default
interface.longDescription: Top-level Codex command for the standard JStack development workflow. One Lead Engineer applies the Think, Plan, Build, Review, Test, Ship structure with task-specific capability methods and validated evidence, without deploying subagents by default.
defaultPrompt: Run the JStack single Lead Engineer workflow.
